locations.name: 新西兰
locations.summary: 新西兰（英語：New Zealand）又称奥特亚罗瓦（毛利語：Aotearoa，直译：「长白云之乡」），位於太平洋西南部的主權島國，是英联邦新西蘭王國的主體部分，首都為惠灵顿，最大的城市為奧克蘭。紐西蘭主要由兩大島嶼組成：北島（Te Ik…

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: The South Island oystercatcher or South Island pied oystercatcher (Haematopus finschi) is one of two common oystercatcher species found in New Zealand

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: Non-breeding habitat includes coastal estuaries, bays, beaches, sand flats, and intertidal mudflats
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海泥滩和浅滩系统。

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: Non-breeding habitat includes coastal estuaries, bays, beaches, sand flats, and intertidal mudflats
relations.object_summary: 海湾、泻湖、盐沼与河口组成的复合湿地。

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: Non-breeding habitat includes coastal estuaries, bays, beaches, sand flats, and intertidal mudflats
relations.object_summary: 淡水与海水交汇形成的高生产力边缘生态系统。

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: Non-breeding habitat includes coastal estuaries, bays, beaches, sand flats, and intertidal mudflats
relations.object_summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

relations.subject: South Island oystercatcher
relations.evidence: The population of this species declined, mainly because of hunting, during the late 19th century and early 20th century but, with legal protection since 1940, has since been increasing
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
